fab_section_md:
- Old, failing septon who had performed the marriage rites for Jaehaerys and Alysanne when the Faith opposed it (fab-birth-death-and-betrayal-10:153)
- He died in his sleep in 54 AC and was interred on Dragonstone (fab-birth-death-and-betrayal-10:153)
identity_line: Septon Oswyck — Old, failing septon who had performed the marriage rites for Jaehaerys and Alysanne when the Faith opposed it.

fab_section_md:
- Grand Maester who hailed Alyssa's second pregnancy as a second miracle and later witnessed Rhaena and Jaehaerys in the king's solar (fab-birth-death-and-betrayal-10:159)
- He suggested the stolen eggs might not hatch away from Dragonstone (fab-birth-death-and-betrayal-10:181)
identity_line: Grand Maester Benifer — Grand Maester who hailed Alyssa's second pregnancy as a second miracle and later witnessed Rhaena and Jaehaerys in the king's solar.

fab_section_md: - Septon who took on Oswyck's duties and doubted Alyssa had strength enough to carry another child to term (fab-birth-death-and-betrayal-10:159)
identity_line: Septon Barth — Septon who took on Oswyck's duties and doubted Alyssa had strength enough to carry another child to term.
